persona.name: James
persona.profile: college student balancing classes, club work, interviews, exercise, and social plans

daily_sleep.contributors: 0-100 subscores for total sleep, efficiency, restfulness, REM, deep sleep, latency, and timing.

daily_readiness.temperature_deviation: Skin temperature deviation from personal baseline in Celsius.
daily_readiness.contributors: Recovery contributors including HRV balance, resting HR, previous night, recovery index, and body temperature.

daily_activity.calories: total_calories is total burn; active_calories is movement-only burn.
daily_activity.class_5_min: 288-character day timeline, one character per 5-minute block.
daily_activity.met: Metabolic equivalent timeline; higher values indicate more exertion.

daily_spo2.breathing_disturbance_index: Events per hour with breathing disturbance patterns.

daily_stress.stress_high: Seconds of high physiological stress while awake.
daily_stress.recovery_high: Seconds in high recovery state while awake.

sleep.average_hrv: Nightly HRV in milliseconds; lower than baseline can indicate stress or poor recovery.
sleep.average_heart_rate: Nightly average heart rate in bpm.
sleep.sleep_phase_5_min: Hypnogram string; Oura codes sleep stages by interval.

heartrate.bpm: Heart rate sample in beats per minute.
heartrate.source: Context such as awake, sleep, rest, workout, or live.
